title: VIX/VIX3M Term-Structure Ratio — Real-Time Contango/Backwardation Stress Flag
summary: Compute the daily VIX/VIX3M ratio using ^VIX and ^VIX3M tickers from yfinance (both free). When ratio >1.0 (backwardation), the system flags a stress regime; when ratio <1.0 (contango), it confirms a favourable environment for long positions. Macrosynergy research confirms VIX backwardation slope has statistically significant predictive power for subsequent S&P 500 returns as a contrarian mean-reversion indicator. This is a single-number, real-time regime check that costs nothing to compute and can gate the entire signal pipeline.
expected_impact: Provides early crisis detection ~2–5 days before price-based signals; backwardation (ratio >1.0) historically coincides with market stress and elevated drawdown risk; contango regime (ratio <1.0) shows statistical edge for long strategies (85.2% of days 2013–2024 per Harbourfront study)
